title: Upstart Q4 2023 Earnings Preview
text: Upstart was scheduled to announce Q4 earnings results on Tuesday, February 13th, 2024, after market close, with a consensus EPS estimate of -$0.14 and a consensus revenue estimate of $135.3M (-7.9% year-over-year). Historical Performance Track Record: Over the last 2 years, UPST beat EPS estimates 63% of the time and beat revenue estimates 63% of the time. Additionally, Upstart has only missed Wall Street's revenue estimates once over the last two years, exceeding top-line expectations by 6.8% on average. Recent Estimate Revisions: Over the three months prior to earnings, EPS estimates saw 0 upward revisions and 3 downward revisions, while revenue estimates saw 1 upward revision and 3 downward revisions. Business Context: The preview materials reflected a challenging operating environment, with interest rates at their highest in decades, elevated consumer risk, multiple bank failures, and extreme caution among lenders.
